{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Karoshan guns
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan guns]] were trained on [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Karoshan research station]] has large guns mounted on the ceiling.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion gave him an encouraging pat. "No!" Then he backed up, paying no attention to the Karoshan guns and wands that had been trained on him since he had laid a hand on her.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
